checks.environment: real GitHub staging repo (cook-anything-staging-pub) + local Supabase stack
checks.observedResult: 5/5 after commit-before-branch redesign: crash-after-commit + BASE ADVANCE (orphan ignored, rebuilt on new base), crash-after-branch + BASE ADVANCE (verified branch adopted), crash-after-pr (no duplicate), unrelated branch refused, allowlist enforced. Empty-deterministic-branch failure mode eliminated by design.
checks.unresolvedRisk: operator remains disabled; full lifecycle on hosted Supabase pending the staging project

checks.environment: real Chromium engine (Playwright, automated) vs deployed staging
checks.observedResult: 21 passed / 1 step-dependent warn / 0 failed after fixes: search incl. Tamil/Hinglish aliases (thayir/pyaz -> 26 matches) + typo, recipe page, Cook Mode open/advance, kitchen/account/my-recipes routes, keyboard tab-order 12/12 + visible focus, no horizontal scroll at 640px, reduced-motion, SW active, offline home+recipe, reconnection, axe 0 violations on 4 pages
checks.unresolvedRisk: automated real-engine only; NOT physical-device or screen-reader evidence

checks.observedResult: axe found 2 critical (unlabeled date input + meal select on kitchen/recipe actions) and site-wide serious color-contrast (tamarind-faint/turmeric-deep 3.66-4.39, below AA 4.5). Fixed: aria-labels added; tokens darkened to #6b5545/#8a5a00 (>=5.0 on all backgrounds). Redeployed staging, re-scanned: 0 violations on all 4 pages.
checks.unresolvedRisk: manual screen-reader pass still required to confirm semantics beyond axe

checks.observedResult: Project creation rejected: org at 2-active-free-project cap. All hosted gates (RLS matrix, OAuth, sync chaos, hosted deletion, restore drill) blocked; local-stack evidence collected and labeled.

blockers.impact: Cannot create the hosted staging project: org <SUPABASE_ORG_ID> already has 2 active free projects (<UNRELATED_PROJECT_A>, <UNRELATED_PROJECT_B>). Creation attempt on 2026-07-12 was rejected by Supabase with the 2-project limit message. Hosted-infra gates (hosted RLS parity, hosted OAuth, hosted deletion/restore drills, sync chaos on real network) remain blocked; local isolated stack evidence is collected instead and labeled as such.
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Pause or delete one unrelated free project, or upgrade the Supabase organization. Then create cook-anything-staging using <SUPABASE_ORG_ID>, <REGION>, and the database password stored in <LOCAL_SECRET_STORE>; link the project, apply migrations 000100–000700, and rerun the Phase 6.6 hosted staging harnesses with staging-scoped environment variables.

blockers.resolution: Real GitHub crash-resumption tests pass (5/5) INCLUDING base-branch advancement between crash and resume, after the commit-before-branch redesign. Operator remains DISABLED pending hosted Supabase + moderation staffing.
